# ð Notes  

 Jun 24, 2026

## Talk shop

Invited [Justin Lobaito](mailto:justin@beardedgingerdesigns.com) <thomasrindfuss@trussservicesllc.com>

Attachments [Talk shop](https://calendar.google.com/calendar/event?eid=dmU0NWljODVnaG5mazN2NXJla2Q5aW5pdmMganVzdGluQGJlYXJkZWRnaW5nZXJkZXNpZ25zLmNvbQ)

Meeting records [Transcript](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?usp=drive_web&tab=t.sks61qofxt9a) 

  
  

### Summary

Strategy session covered product launch planning for water technology and agreement on a recurring service contract structure.  
  
**Water technology product launch**  
A new water restructuring brand will launch 3 models featuring capacities from 500 to 5,000 gallons per hour. Target markets include livestock growers and agricultural drone operators.  
  
**Sales and distribution approach**  
Units priced between $7,000 and $35,000 utilize a sales funnel requiring a $5,000 deposit. Initial distribution is restricted to 2 partners to control market presence.  
  
**Service contract agreement**  
An 18-month flat-rate contract was selected to handle e-commerce integration and ongoing development. This structure provides continuous support throughout the business rollout.

  
  

### Decisions

## **Aligned**

  - **Project confidentiality and non-disclosure** All project discussions and product details are to be kept confidential until formal publication.
  - **Sales funnel and deposit strategy** The sales funnel strategy is set to require a $5,000 online deposit followed by direct salesperson contact to finalize transactions.
  - **Initial target market focus** Initial market focus is restricted to livestock and cattle producers to prioritize the highest-data sector.
  - **18-month flat-rate engagement model** The project engagement will operate under an 18-month flat-rate contract covering all development phases and ongoing maintenance.

  

We've **updated the Decisions section** using your feedback.

Let us know what you think: [Helpful](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_5p6FWBVWvynleNU?isGoogler=no&isHelpful=yes) or [Not Helpful](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_5p6FWBVWvynleNU?isGoogler=no&isHelpful=no)

  
  

### Next steps

  - \[Thomas Rindfuss\] Prepare Data Points: Compile and provide clean, formal data points and information regarding the product for the new website.
  - \[Justin Lobaito\] Send Project Proposal: Draft and submit a project proposal and rough outline based on the provided information by Friday.
  - \[Justin Lobaito\] Schedule Interview: Reach out by tomorrow to propose times for a 30 minute interview next week regarding the dealer portal project.

  
  

### Details

  - **Confidentiality Agreement**: Thomas Rindfuss and Justin Lobaito agreed to keep all discussed information confidential until formally published, opting for a verbal agreement rather than a formal NDA at this stage ([00:00:14](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.gsewqthk329h)). Everything discussed regarding the product, its capabilities, and its target audience is to remain strictly between the two parties ([00:01:12](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.1dpjjdc5thbi)).
  - **Product Overview**: Thomas Rindfuss introduced a new water restructuring technology which utilizes a canister-based mechanism and magnets to realign hydrogen bonds in water. This technology makes water more readily available and replenishing for livestock and can reduce unpleasant odors or textures in residential water systems ([00:02:52](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.ffq0mbs2i2f1)). The units, which do not function as filtration systems or additives but as a physical mechanism, can be installed at water entry points ([00:04:06](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.2yfab4706mbd)).
  - **Business Development Lessons**: Thomas Rindfuss expressed that previous experience in the drone industry highlighted the importance of having a robust website, CRM, and management systems early on. They emphasized that they were ill-prepared for their previous venture and intend to ensure all infrastructure is ready before the public launch of this new product ([00:07:46](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.cyj9czfaxo3v)).
  - **Branding and Product Models**: The product will be launched under the brand name Refuge Sales and Solution. Thomas Rindfuss aims to emulate the distributor website style of New AG, including a products tab featuring three specific models: the 500 gallon an hour, 1,000 gallon an hour, and 5,000 gallon an hour units ([00:09:09](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.zgz1ncp7g6i9)).
  - **Sales and Pricing Strategy**: Thomas Rindfuss identified a price range of $7,000 to $35,000 for the units and plans to implement a sales funnel where customers can place a $5,000 deposit online and finish the transaction with a salesperson. They intend to use this method to handle warm or hot leads efficiently and minimize the time spent per lead ([00:11:26](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.upqnrqmlvmq2)).
  - **Distribution Strategy**: There will be only two distributors for the technology in the United States. While the initial model focuses on direct-to-consumer sales, Thomas Rindfuss is open to exploring a dealership network in the future, similar to Teraplex or Coca-Cola distribution networks ([00:14:46](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.l1baktl7rklq)).
  - **Launch Timeline**: Thomas Rindfuss is not under external pressure for a specific launch date but intends to have the website ready before the upcoming spray season concludes ([00:16:08](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.dq9n5gmzkaxm)). They plan to continue working on content, graphics, and animations while focusing on the product launch once their current spraying responsibilities are complete ([00:17:22](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.hgrdkdg2jdlw)).
  - **Market Focus and Data Application**: Initial marketing efforts will focus on livestock growers and large-scale producers, as this sector provides the strongest existing data ([00:18:27](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.1es25wy23ae3)). The technology is also applicable to the agricultural drone space, where it aids in chemical adhesion and drift reduction by creating more consistent water density ([00:19:32](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.xkmbvui5s634)).
  - **Website Content and Data Presentation**: Thomas Rindfuss plans to include testimonials, diagrams, and side-by-side test data—such as NDVI imagery—to demonstrate effectiveness ([00:21:50](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.3i0r8y6xnui0)). The website structure will likely include sections for products, FAQs, and industry sectors such as entrepreneurs, farmers, and dealers ([00:23:15](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.omgq5zprtgqg)).
  - **Installation and Product Maintenance**: The units are designed to be simplistic, with no moving parts, no electricity requirements, and minimal maintenance ([00:14:46](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.l1baktl7rklq)) ([00:26:58](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.pao7dh67kuz9)). Thomas Rindfuss noted that the models, named IFW (meaning "it freaking works"), can be installed by homeowners or farmers, and they plan to provide post-purchase manual resources on the website ([00:25:55](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.22vs08hil7ga)).
  - **Contracting and Service Structure**: Justin Lobaito proposed an 18-month contract based on a flat-rate model that covers all phases of development, including SEO, e-commerce integration, and ongoing monthly meetings. This model is intended to keep the service provider engaged with the business as it evolves rather than treating the project as a single large fee ([00:29:12](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.970qqb8afa3f)).
  - **Project Next Steps**: Justin Lobaito will review the email materials sent by Thomas Rindfuss and provide a rough project outline and range estimate. Following this, they will conduct a formal kickoff meeting to define the timeline and project phases, with potential use of Shopify or Stripe to handle e-commerce and payment processing ([00:31:01](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.ce70jpoq55f8)).
  - **Future Collaboration**: Justin Lobaito invited Thomas Rindfuss to participate in a 30-minute interview next week regarding the Teraplex dealer portal, as they are seeking insights from active dealers to improve dealer onboarding and product information systems. Thomas Rindfuss agreed to the conversation, pending their travel schedule ([00:34:34](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12bc7jEo_yv9Jo7OZrhePfSpapr_TDSGPk000nTfyzQQ/edit?ouid=104977189453612189512#heading=h.vdy05hibo74i)).
